title: 2025-12-22 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 1.58
description: New daily signal for 2025-12-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 1.58/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-12-22, the score printed 1.58/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
